must_detect.matched_text:
Internal memo (HK) – Harbour Peak Holdings Limited: M&A and privacy controls status for proposed acquisition of Lotus Ferrum Technology Co. with co-investment by Jade Banyan Partners Fund I LP.
We confirm that specific, non-public financial metrics of Lotus Ferrum constitute inside information under the SFO; MNPI remains confined to the clean team, and no dealing in Harbour Peak shares by insiders has occurred during the blackout period.
Cross‑border transfer: data export approval DEA‑2026‑041 for payroll processing to DataFoundry Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) was approved on 18 May, with DPA Schedule 2 (processor terms), encryption at rest, and a transfer impact assessment referencing PCPD guidance; there are no unapproved outbound transfers.
Employment onboarding forms for seconded staff (Phase 1 integration) capture names, emails, and role histories only; HKID numbers are not collected and employee numbers are truncated per our minimisation standard.
A DSAR from Mr. Paulo Tse (former contractor) received on 02 May was fulfilled on 07 May; access report issued and non-statutory records erased, with a retention hold applied to payroll records in line with tax requirements.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Aria Ng (fund investor) withdrew consent for marketing communications on 15 May; her profile is flagged “no marketing,” and the suppression list was updated within 24 hours.
Data retention: onboarding forms in the M&A staging folder now have a 12‑month retention period (down from 24 months) per the revised HR schedule effective 1 May; auto‑deletion has been tested and evidenced.
For the avoidance of doubt, the “production dataset” referenced in Annex B is illustrative only and does not authorise the use of identifiable customer data in diligence; only anonymised, aggregated revenue cohorts are provided to the clean room.
No MNPI has been shared with potential finance providers beyond a redacted term sheet and KPI ranges; the insider list has been updated and acknowledgments are on file.
Data room logs show no downloads of salary tables or employee contact rosters since the last audit on 19 May, and watermarking remains enabled.
A draft DPA with Blue Lantern Services (HK) Limited covering HR systems integration is attached as Schedule 2; signature is pending counterparty board approval, but processing will not commence until fully executed.
Erasure request window: no open erasure requests remain as at today; prior erasure tickets EP‑1441 and EP‑1443 are closed with evidence captured in the PDPO register.
Policy‑only control: the “Emergency Export Waiver” remains on file for business continuity but is not active and cannot be invoked without joint approval from Legal and the DPO under the Cross‑Border Playbook.
HKEX communications: no pre‑announcement is required at this stage; should a firm intention form, we will trigger the inside information assessment and liaise with the SFC on any necessary trading halt.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
